full_text:
Cui Jun (Zhouping) 崔鈞 (州平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Jun (崔鈞), styledZhouping (州平), was born in Boling. One of Zhuge Liang’s close childhood friends. Friend of Xu Shu as well. From Boling.
